definition: Physical presence of sufficient food and water resources
measurement_note: Use production storage imports reserves rainfall river flow groundwater reservoir and environmental-flow evidence

definition: Ability of households communities farms institutions and ecosystems to obtain food and water
measurement_note: Use affordability distance infrastructure rights distribution service continuity and social protection data

definition: Consistency of food and water supply and access over time
measurement_note: Review seasonal variability market volatility storage capacity drought flood infrastructure reliability and reserve systems

definition: Safety nutrition sanitation usability and suitability for human ecological and productive needs
measurement_note: Use food safety nutrition water quality salinity pathogens chemical contamination and sanitation data

definition: Ability to adjust production allocation governance consumption infrastructure and ecosystems as conditions change
measurement_note: Assess monitoring learning flexible rules crop diversity local knowledge scenario planning and institutional memory

definition: Extent to which food-water resilience protects vulnerable users and enables legitimate participation
measurement_note: Use disaggregated hunger unsafe water affordability recovery participation rights and access data

definition: Risk that strategies preserve short-term performance by depleting aquifers soils ecosystems or future capacity
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger depletion review safeguards and long-term viability analysis
